Description: Defines/owns team AI usage guidelines, governance and data-security compliance
Drives adoption — % of team actively & effectively using Claude; license utilisation
Tracks and reports team-level AI productivity ROI (cycle-time, throughput, quality)
Embeds AI into engineering workflows & standards (review, testing, docs, design exploration)
Ensures responsible, secure and fair usage; zero data-handling violations across team
Upskills team on AI, mentors, and builds an experimentation/innovation culture
Evaluates emerging AI tools/features and recommends or pilots adoption
Target: Minimal re-architecture due to poor design decisions.
